strengths: 15+ years of diverse engineering experience across cloud, AI, and infrastructure
Proven AI-agent and agentic workflow contributions at re:cinq with MCP frameworks
Strong open-source leadership with GISCollective and multiple DLang libraries
concerns: No explicit mention of Master's/PhD in AI-related field, limiting preferred qualification alignment
Limited evidence of direct cloud platform strategy or customer advisory experience at director level
German language proficiency is basic, potentially hindering local stakeholder engagement in Berlin
response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates exceptional technical depth across AI-agent systems, cloud infrastructure, and open-source innovation, with strong evidence of engineering leadership and product impact. His work at re:cinq on MCP and agentic workflows directly aligns with AI strategy goals. However, the absence of an advanced AI degree and limited documentation of strategic customer advisory roles create gaps against preferred qualifications, though his hands-on builder fluency compensates significantly.
